fields.note: resolve_image, resolve_audio, resolve_document methods - adding zero-byte validation

content:
type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: I'll own this file since my changes modify the existing resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document methods directly. Please send a SPEC for resolve_image_with_size/resolve_audio_with_size/resolve_document_with_size so I can add them alongside my changes.

fields.note: I'll own this file since my changes modify the existing resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document methods directly. Please send a SPEC for resolve_image_with_size/resolve_audio_with_size/resolve_document_with_size so I can add them alongside my changes.

content:
type: DEFER
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
spec: In each of the three resolve methods (resolve_image, resolve_audio, resolve_document) in ImageBlock, AudioBlock, DocumentBlock respectively, after obtaining the final BytesIO buffer (the one about to be returned), add a zero-byte check before returning: (1) bio.seek(0, 2) to seek to end, (2) size = bio.tell() to get buffer size, (3) bio.seek(0) to seek back to start, (4) if size == 0: raise ValueError(f"resolve_image returned zero bytes") (use 'resolve_audio'/'resolve_document' respectively for those methods, matching the method name in the message). This must apply to ALL return paths within each resolve_* method (e.g. base64-provided path, path-provided path, url-provided path) so that any zero-length buffer is caught right before the method returns it. Place the check as the last step before the final return in each method.
note: Please implement this validation in resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document since you're owning the file. Since your new *_with_size methods call these, they'll automatically get the validation.

This must apply to ALL return paths within each resolve_* method (e.g. base64-provided path, path-provided path, url-provided path) so that any zero-length buffer is caught right before the method returns it. Place the check as the last step before the final return in each method.
